description: All schedules have 0 ZT unresolved and 0 High unresolved. Tests explicit zero reporting in Paragraph 3 and ensures narrator states each schedule's ZT+High unresolved is 0.
All schedules have 0 ZT unresolved and 0 High unresolved. Tests explicit zero reporting in Paragraph 3 and ensures narrator states each schedule's ZT+High unresolved is 0.
Only one schedule in scope (meta.scheduleCount=1, single entry in all arrays). Tests that resolutionTrend shows 0 pp change for all metrics and Paragraphs 1 and 3 narrate only one schedule.
Only one schedule in scope (meta.scheduleCount=1, single entry in all arrays). Tests that resolutionTrend shows 0 pp change for all metrics and Paragraphs 1 and 3 narrate only one schedule.

Positive resolution trend: resolvedHealthPpChange >= +15 pp, openIssuesPpChange <= -15 pp. Tests that narrator reports positive ppChange with + prefix and current schedule has low open-issue rate (<25%).

Positive resolution trend: resolvedHealthPpChange >= +15 pp, openIssuesPpChange <= -15 pp. Tests that narrator reports positive ppChange with + prefix and current schedule has low open-issue rate (<25%).
Large issue counts (1000+ per schedule in current) with very high open rate (70%+ open in current schedule). Tests numeric accuracy at scale and bold formatting on large open-issue counts.
Large issue counts (1000+ per schedule in current) with very high open rate (70%+ open in current schedule). Tests numeric accuracy at scale and bold formatting on large open-issue counts.

Very high ZT unresolved in current schedule (ztAndHighUnresolvedPercent >= 80%). Tests bold formatting on high ZT+High percent and verbatim accuracy on ztAndHighUnresolvedPercent near the top of the scale.
